info.title: Velora Market API
info.description: Velora Market API — direct aggregator pricing and Augustus calldata.

get.summary: Get a Market route for a token pair

parameters.name: srcToken
parameters.description: Source token address. A token symbol listed in /tokens can be used instead. Example uses ETH.

parameters.name: srcDecimals
parameters.description: Source token decimals. Can be omitted if a token symbol is used in srcToken.

parameters.name: destToken
parameters.description: Destination token address. A token symbol listed in /tokens can be used instead. Example uses USDC.

parameters.name: destDecimals
parameters.description: Destination token decimals. Can be omitted if a token symbol is used in destToken.

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: srcToken amount (SELL) or destToken amount (BUY), in WEI/raw units.

parameters.name: network
parameters.description: EVM chain ID. Default: 1 (Mainnet). Market uses `network` for this parameter; Delta uses `chainId` — both are EVM chain IDs.

parameters.name: otherExchangePrices
parameters.description: If true, the response includes price quotes from other exchanges in an `others` object.

parameters.name: includeDEXS
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of DEXs to include.

parameters.name: excludeDEXS
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of DEXs to exclude.

parameters.name: excludeRFQ
parameters.description: Exclude all RFQ liquidity from pricing.

parameters.name: includeContractMethods
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of contract methods to include.

parameters.name: excludeContractMethods
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of contract methods to exclude.

parameters.name: userAddress
parameters.description: End-user wallet address.

parameters.name: route
parameters.description: Dash-separated list of tokens for the price route. Max 4 tokens.

parameters.name: partner
parameters.description: Partner string. Defaults to `anon` which charges 1bps fee for all swaps.

parameters.name: maxImpact
parameters.description: Bypass API price-impact check (default = 15%). Value in %.

parameters.name: receiver
parameters.description: Receiver wallet address. Omit when swapping from/to the same account.

parameters.name: srcTokenTransferFee
parameters.description: Tax in basis points charged on srcToken transfers.

parameters.name: destTokenTransferFee
parameters.description: Tax in basis points charged on destToken transfers.

parameters.name: srcTokenDexTransferFee
parameters.description: Tax in BPS charged only on DEX swaps for srcToken.

parameters.name: destTokenDexTransferFee
parameters.description: Tax in BPS charged only on DEX swaps for destToken.

parameters.name: version
parameters.description: Protocol version. Use "5" for legacy v5; default is "6.2".

parameters.name: excludeContractMethodsWithoutFeeModel
parameters.description: Exclude contract methods that don't support the fee model.

parameters.name: ignoreBadUsdPrice
parameters.description: Skip the USD-price availability check.

200.description: Market route. Calldata-ready against Augustus v6.2 when `version=6.2`.

post.summary: Build calldata for a Market swap

parameters.name: network
parameters.description: EVM chain ID. Market uses `network`; Delta uses `chainId`.

400.description: Invalid input or stale priceRoute. Documented examples: `InvalidInput`, `StalePriceRoute`.

Address.description: EVM address (20 bytes, hex-encoded with `0x` prefix). Use the mixed-case placeholder `0xEeeeeEeeeEeEeeEeEeEeeEEEeeeeEeeeeeeeEEeE` for native ETH.

ChainId.description: EVM chain ID. Supported values today include 1 (Mainnet), 10 (Optimism), 56 (BSC), 137 (Polygon), 8453 (Base), 42161 (Arbitrum), 43114 (Avalanche), 100 (Gnosis). The set is open — call GET /chains for the live list.

TokenAmount.description: Token amount in WEI / raw units (no decimal point). Serialized as a string to preserve precision for amounts that exceed JavaScript Number range.

ErrorCode.description: Documented Velora error code (e.g. `PricingError`, `InvalidInput`, `UnsupportedChain`, `StalePriceRoute`, `InvalidSignature`). The set is open — handle codes you recognize and fall back to a generic error path for everything else. See /api-reference/troubleshooting for known codes.

MarketPriceRoute.description: Market route block. Calldata-ready against Augustus v6.2 when `version=6.2`.

priceRoute.description: The `priceRoute` block returned by GET /prices, passed verbatim — do not recompute or re-encode.

MarketTransactionResponse.description: Augustus calldata + tx envelope ready to broadcast.
